prompt:
Goal: Create a minimalist white-background fashion magazine advertising poster for elegant women’s eyeglasses, featuring a soft anime-style young woman in a refined librarian-inspired outfit.

Canvas: Vertical poster, 4:5 aspect ratio, bright off-white background, airy luxury magazine spacing, warm beige and champagne-gold palette, delicate watercolor/anime illustration finish, high detail in hair, fabric, and accessories.

Layout: Place the illustrated model on the right two-thirds of the poster, cropped from head to mid-torso. Her face is intentionally covered by a large flat warm-beige square placeholder centered over the face, leaving the hair, ear, neck, hand, and outfit visible. Put all typography and product details on the left third. Add a small eyeglasses product illustration near the bottom-left corner.

Brand area: At top left, include 2 discrete brand elements: a thin gold oval monogram logo with a cursive L and small sparkle, and the brand name LUMIÈRE CLAIRE in elegant serif capitals. Add small Japanese brand reading directly below with the default text ルミエール・クレール.

Main headline and copy: Under the brand, add the large Japanese headline 知性を、やさしく\n映すまなざし。 in refined dark gray type. Below it, add a thin horizontal gold divider with 1 small sparkle centered between two lines. Under the divider, add 3 short Japanese copy lines in small type: 「日常に寄り添い、あなたらしさを」, 「そっと引き立てるアイウェア。」, and 「しなやかな輝きを、瞳に。」

Specification block: Below the copy, create exactly 5 labeled specification rows in Japanese with a thin vertical gold rule at the left. The 5 rows are: 1) 「メーカー： ルミエール・クレール」, 2) 「種類： オーバルフレーム」, 3) 「モデル名： エトワール・Douce」 with small furigana-like 「ドゥース」 underneath, 4) 「想定度数： ±0.50 ～ ±2.00」, 5) 「価格： ¥16,800（税込）」. Keep the price slightly bolder.

Model details: The character is a graceful young woman with light honey-blonde hair in a voluminous messy high bun, soft loose strands framing the face, fine linework, and luminous highlights. She wears an ivory ribbed knit cardigan, a white ruffled high-neck blouse, a beige ribbon bow at the collar, and a thin crossbody chain with a visible ID badge. Her right hand is raised delicately near her chin, suggesting she is adjusting or presenting eyewear, though the glasses on her face are hidden by the beige face placeholder.

Visible outfit and accessory count: Include exactly 6 notable outfit/accessory elements: 1 ivory ribbed cardigan, 1 white ruffled blouse, 1 beige ribbon bow, 1 thin gold-toned chain strap, 1 rectangular ID badge reading 図書館員, and 1 small round gold charm near the chain.

Product section: At bottom left, draw exactly 1 separate pair of oval eyeglasses in pale champagne-gold metal with clear lenses, delicate nose pads, and thin temples. Add 2 short Japanese product-copy lines beneath: 「繊細なラインが柔らかく顔立ちに寄り添うオーバルフレーム。」 and 「軽やかなかけ心地で、毎日を心地よく。」

Visual style: Elegant Japanese fashion-ad layout, minimal and sophisticated, soft shadows, warm natural light, delicate gold accents, thin serif typography, subtle paper-white background, polished magazine poster composition.

Constraints: Keep the large beige square over the face as a clean flat placeholder with no facial features. Use exactly 5 specification rows, exactly 3 small copy lines under the divider, exactly 2 bottom product-copy lines, exactly 1 eyeglasses product illustration, and exactly 6 listed outfit/accessory elements. No extra logos, no watermark, no clutter.
